prompt: Fill in all the sorries in AutomatedProofs/JEPA.lean. The lemmas in AutomatedProofs/Lemmas.lean are fully proved and available as dependencies. Focus on: critical_time_ordering, JEPA_rho_ordering, and the ODE lemmas (quasiStatic_approx, diagonal_ODE, offDiag_ODE, offDiag_bound, preconditioner_integral_diverges_L1, critical_time_formula).
